title: ImagineFunUtils
description: A QOL Mod for the ImagineFun Minecraft Server
body:
![ImagineFun Server Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b054342bcb4119ad9a885842003524cfdb45ae7b.png)

ImagineFunUtils is a mod created for ImagineFun that is focused on improving the experience of our players. All of the mods features are client side improvements and bug fixes to enhance gameplay. While the primary goal of our server is to create the best vanilla experience possible, this mod serves as a way for us to go above and beyond to improve the experience for our dedicated players.

# 🔥 Features
- Adds ImagineFun to the server list on first launch
- Adds support for ImagineFun's in-game screen system

# 📥 Mod Information
ImagineFunUtils is a fabric mod made for the current latest version of Minecraft (1.21.11) We recommend using [The ImagineFun Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/imaginefun) which comes with this mod included! You can install this mod or our modpack directly on modrinth by pressing the download button above!

# ❓ I need help
Join the [ImagineFun Discord Server](https://discord.gg/disneyland) and send a message in #support. We'd be happy to help you debug any issues you're having with the mod
